dangling_cname.description: Dangling CNAME detection -- subdomain points to deprovisioned third-party service, allowing attacker to claim the subdomain

probes.description: GitHub Pages takeover fingerprint -- 404 with 'There isn't a GitHub Pages site here' indicates dangling CNAME to unclaimed github.io

words: There isn't a GitHub Pages site here

probes.description: Heroku takeover fingerprint -- 'No such app' or 'herokucdn.com/error-pages' indicates dangling CNAME to unclaimed Heroku app
AWS S3 takeover fingerprint -- 'NoSuchBucket' indicates dangling CNAME to unclaimed S3 bucket

words: The specified bucket does not exist

probes.description: Azure takeover fingerprint -- NXDOMAIN-like response or default Azure page on unclaimed subdomain

words: The resource you are looking for has been removed

probes.description: Shopify takeover fingerprint -- 'Sorry, this shop is currently unavailable' on dangling CNAME to unclaimed Shopify store

words: Sorry, this shop is currently unavailable

probes.description: Fastly takeover fingerprint -- 'Fastly error: unknown domain' indicates dangling CNAME to unclaimed Fastly service

words: Please check that this domain has been added to a service

probes.description: Pantheon takeover fingerprint -- '404 Unknown Site' or Pantheon error page on dangling CNAME
Surge.sh takeover fingerprint -- 'project not found' on dangling CNAME to unclaimed Surge project
